title: Pure and module tests deterministic evidence bank

items.title: Pure and module tests: reject the invalid model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this JavaScript: Language and Browser Applications misconception? One happy-path assertion is enough when line coverage reaches 100 percent.
hints: Compare both options with platform semantics and observable user or browser evidence.
